chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 2224 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.01.2018 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 7883/17 For katcha peshi Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chandio, advocate for petitioner Mr. Abid Mushtaq Arain, advocate files power for respondent Nos. 7 to 9, taken on record. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and shall provide legal protection to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. present in court files comments on behalf of official respondents and gives such an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner, shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide legal protection to the petitioner as is provided to the other citizens of this country. In view of above undertaking of learned A.A.G., learned counsel for petitioner does not press the instant petition which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
